tooltip: Clean inactive swipes in this turn
tooltipAll: Clean inactive swipes in this chat
confirmTurnBody: This will delete {nRemove} other candidate replies in this turn and keep the current one ({current} / {total}). This cannot be undone.
confirmAllBody: This will delete {swipeRemoveTotal} unselected swipes across {turnCount} turns and keep what you currently see in each turn. This cannot be undone.
batchSizeDesc: Turns processed per batch when cleaning the whole chat (max 50)
